name: The Marshal’s Hands

structure.name: Marshal Protected
structure.description: The Marshal stays behind Cassian and Cael while Donny pressures the room.

structure.name: Marshal at 50%
structure.description: Donny briefly damages the Marshal to about half health.

structure.name: The Hands Step In
structure.description: Cassian and Cael take over the fight as the main mini-boss duo.

structure.name: Explosion Interruption
structure.description: An explosion interrupts the fight before either bodyguard is defeated. The Marshal and twins escape. Donny continues to find Dex.

winCondition: Survive and damage the bodyguards enough to trigger the explosion, then continue toward Dex.
notes: This encounter is an interrupted mini-boss set piece, not a final victory.
